summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 0DTE Trading Range Calculator Dashboard. All backend APIs and frontend features working perfectly with 100% success rate.
passed_tests: All 4 ticker APIs (SPY/SPX/QQQ/BTC-USD) returning valid data
Range calculation endpoints working for all tickers
Market status API returning correct status
Anchor price operations (set/get/clear) working
Multi-ticker endpoint returning data for all symbols
Dashboard loads with terminal-style dark theme
Ticker tabs switch data correctly
Price card displays current price, change, OHLC data
Range bands card shows high/low bands and range status
Range status indicator correctly shows INSIDE/OUTSIDE RANGE
Historical ranges table displays 5-day data
Set 10AM Anchor button functionality working
Refresh button reloads data
Settings dropdown changes refresh interval (10s/30s/60s)
All tickers panel shows all 4 tickers with live data
Market status correctly shows MARKET CLOSED
Last update timestamp displays correctly
Stats cards show avg daily range, high/low bands, volume
Ticker tape scrolls with all symbols
No JavaScript errors or console warnings
